aiCommentEN: Market swings, so does my heart.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会有技术性反弹。
【关键位置】
65,000 美元以下为关键支撑位。
【短线策略】
考虑在 65,000 美元附近做多，目标位 68,000 美元。
【风险提醒】
恐慌贪婪指数过低，市场可能会出现快速反弹，但风险依然较高，交易需谨慎。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may have a technical rebound in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$65,000 is the key support level.
[Outlook]
Consider buying at around $65,000, targeting $68,000.
[Reminder]
The Fear & Greed Index is low, the market may rebound quickly, but the risk is still high, trade with caution.
